slides.headline: Empowering Future VASCO Leaders
slides.body: Build a support network for new VASCOs and veteran services professionals.

slides.headline: Identify Mentors
slides.body: Select experienced VASCOs who can guide new hires.

slides.headline: Set Clear Expectations
slides.body: Define roles, responsibilities, and goals for the mentorship program.

slides.headline: Develop Training Materials
slides.body: Create resources to help mentors and mentees learn together.

slides.headline: Monitor Progress
slides.body: Regularly assess the effectiveness of the mentorship program.

outline.caption: Empower future VASCO leaders with mentorship programs. Steps: Identify mentors, set clear expectations, develop training materials, monitor progress, celebrate success. Learn more at https://aimilitaryservices.com/blog/mentorship-programs-vascos

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is 'Set Clear Expectations', as the text is slightly small and could be more readable. A top fix would be to increase the font size slightly for better visibility.
